title: HIV-1 NC-POL Amplification and Oxford Nanopore Sequencing for Drug Resistance Analysis
author: Nicola Coetzee

steps.title: Prepare the RNA-primer Mix and RT Mix as following
steps.instruction: Prepare the RNA-primer Mix and RT Mix as following: Reagent Final concentration Volume per reaction Volume per reaction 1 dNTPs 10 mM 0.5 mM 1 2 Reverse primer set R1a:R1b 10 µM (1:1) 0.25 µM 1 3 Nuclease-free water - - 1 4 Template RNA 10 5 Total volume 13 RNA-primer Mix Reagent Final concentration Volume per reaction Volume per reaction 1 5x SSIV buffer 5X 1X 4 2 DTT 0.1 M 0.01 M 1 3 Ribonuclease inhibitor 40 U/μL 40 U 1 4 Superscript IV Reverse Transcriptase 200 U/ μL 50 U 1 5 Total volume 7 RT Mix

steps.title: Prepare Pre-nested PCR Master Mix as follow
steps.instruction: Prepare Pre-nested PCR Master Mix as follow: Reagent Final concentration Volume per reaction Volume per reaction 1 SuperFi II PCR Master Mix 2X 1X 10 2 Forward primer set: F1a:F1b 20 µM (1:1) 0.4 µM 0.4 3 Reverse primer set: R1a:R1b 20 µM (1:1) 0.4 µM 0.4 4 Nuclease-free water 4.2 5 cDNA 5 6 Total volume 20 Pre-nested Master Mix

steps.title: Prepare the Nested Master Mix as follow
steps.instruction: Prepare the Nested Master Mix as follow: %s %s

steps.title: This section describes bead-based purification of...
steps.instruction: This section describes bead-based purification of PCR products using AMPure XP magnetic beads .

steps.title: Prepare sequencing libraries using the ONT...
steps.instruction: Prepare sequencing libraries using the ONT Native Barcoding Kit 96 V14 (SQK-NBD114.96) protocol. Sequencing library size (≤30 amplicons per Flongle recommended).

steps.title: This section describes analysis of Oxford...
steps.instruction: This section describes analysis of Oxford Nanopore sequencing data using bioinformatic pipelines and sequence analysis software for consensus sequence generation and HIV drug resistance interpretation.

steps.title: Add 3 µL of antisense mix into each PCR tube
steps.instruction: Add 3 µL of antisense mix into each PCR tube.

steps.title: Add 10 µL of RNA to RNA-primer mix
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL of RNA to RNA-primer mix.

steps.title: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:05:00 and immediately cool on ice for at least 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Add 7 µL of RT mix to RNA-primer mix
steps.instruction: Add 7 µL of RT mix to RNA-primer mix.

steps.title: Incubate at 50 °C for 00:50:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 50 °C for 00:50:00 and 85 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 20 µL of cDNA to 1
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of cDNA to 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: This section describes purification of cDNA...
steps.instruction: This section describes purification of cDNA using RNAClean XP magnetic beads.

steps.title: Add 36 µL of RNAClean XP...
steps.instruction: Add 36 µL of RNAClean XP beads to reaction volume (1.8× cDNA volume).

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Place tubes on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on a magnetic rack and wait for liquid to clear ~ 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Wash beads 3× with 250 µL of 70% EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash beads 3× with 250 µL of 70% EtOH .

steps.title: Air dry for ~ 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Air dry for ~ 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge and remove any remaining...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge and remove any remaining EtOH using a P10 pipette without disturbing the bead pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend beads in 20 µL 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads in 20 µL 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge and incubate on shaker...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge and incubate on shaker at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Place tubes on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on a magnetic rack and wait for liquid to clear ~ 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Transfer elute to a new microcentrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer elute to a new microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Aliquot 15 µL of Pre-nested Master...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 15 µL of Pre-nested Master Mix into each PCR tube.

steps.title: Add 5 µL of purified cDNA to master mix
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL of purified cDNA to master mix. Template Adjustment: HIV-1 plasma viral load <50 000 copies/mL: use undiluted cDNA HIV-1 plasma viral load ≥50 000 copies/mL: dilute cDNA 1:20

steps.title: Seal and spin tubes/plate down and...
steps.instruction: Seal and spin tubes/plate down and run PCR following the conditions below Step Temperature (°C) Duration Cycles 1 Phase I 2 Initial denature 98 2 minutes 1 3 Phase II 4 Denature 98 10 secondes 5 5 Anneal 58 15 seconds 6 Extension 72 3 minutes 7 Phase III (touchdown) 8 Denature 98 10 seconds 15 9 Anneal (Decrease by 0.5°C each cycle 58 15 seconds 10 Extension 72 3 minutes 11 Phase IV 12 Denature 98 10 seconds 15 13 Anneal 50 15 seconds 14 Extension 72 3 minutes 15 Phase V 16 Final extension 72 6 minutes Thermocycling condition for NC-POL PCR

steps.title: Aliquot 15 µL of Nested Master...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 15 µL of Nested Master Mix into each PCR reaction.

steps.title: Dilute Pre-nested PCR product 1:50 using 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl
steps.instruction: Dilute Pre-nested PCR product 1:50 using 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl .

steps.title: Add 5 µL of diluted Pre-nested...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL of diluted Pre-nested product to Nested PCR reaction.

steps.title: Run same thermocycling conditions as for...
steps.instruction: Run same thermocycling conditions as for the Pre-nested PCR (Step 4.3). Expected Product: Confirm amplified product size of ~3.5 kb by agarose gel electrophoresis.

steps.title: Transfer 16 µL of Nested PCR...
steps.instruction: Transfer 16 µL of Nested PCR product to DNA LoBind tube.

steps.title: Incubate on shaking incubator at 900...
steps.instruction: Incubate on shaking incubator at 900 rpm, Room temperature, for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack and wait...
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack and wait for liquid to clear ~ 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Wash beads 2× with 250 µL of 80% EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash beads 2× with 250 µL of 80% EtOH .

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge and remove remaining EtOH...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge and remove remaining EtOH using a P10 pipette without disturbing the bead pellet.

steps.title: Air dry for ~ 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Air dry for ~ 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Resuspend beads in 20 µL 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads in 20 µL 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl .

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge and incubate on shaking...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge and incubate on shaking incubator at 900 rpm, 37 °C, for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Analysis pipeline
steps.instruction: Analysis pipeline: Nano-RECall for the POL region and Nano_RECall_NC for the Gag-NC region. Adequate sequencing coverage across POL and NC region (400 X).

steps.title: Translated NC consensus sequence mutation analysis
steps.instruction: Translated NC consensus sequence mutation analysis: Geneious Prime.

steps.title: Add 28
steps.instruction: Add 28.8 µL of AMPure XP beads to reaction volume (1.8× Nested PCR volume after gel electrophoresis).

steps.title: Place tubes on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on a magnetic rack and wait for liquid to clear ~ 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Transfer elute to a new DNA LoBind tube
steps.instruction: Transfer elute to a new DNA LoBind tube. Quantification Measure DNA using Qubit dsDNA HS Assay on a Qubit fluorometer. Recommended input for sequencing: 200 fmol (455 ng for 3.5 kb amplicon). DNA concentrations should be used for equimolar pooling prior to sequencing.

steps.title: Drug resistance interpretation
steps.instruction: Drug resistance interpretation: Stanford University HIV Drug Resistance Database.

steps.title: Load onto R10
steps.instruction: Load onto R10.4.1 Flongle (FLO-FLG114) or R10.4.1 flow cell (FLO-MIN114) and run on GridION with the following run parameters: Standard run time: 24 hours High accuracy basecalling Trim barcodes Size selection: Read length (2.5 kb – 4.5 kb) Qscore: 9

steps.title: Pipette mix carefully until pellet resuspended
steps.instruction: Pipette mix carefully until pellet resuspended.

steps.title: Incubate without mixing for > 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate without mixing for > 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Resuspend RNA pellet in ice cold...
steps.instruction: Resuspend RNA pellet in ice cold 5 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl according to the pre-determined plasma viral load: HIV-RNA plasma viral load (copies/mL) Volume of 5mM Tris-HCl (µL) 1 20 2 50 000 - 100 000 35 3 >100 000 50 *If viral load is unknown, use 20 µL resuspension volume.

steps.title: Air dry for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Air dry for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge and remove any remaining...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge and remove any remaining EtOH using a P10 pipette.

steps.title: Wash the pellet 3× with 1000 µL of 70% EtOH
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet 3× with 1000 µL of 70% EtOH . Centrifuge at 21100 x g, 10 °C, for 00:20:00 during the first two washes and 00:10:00 during the final wash.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 21100 x g, 10 °C, for 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 21100 x g, 10 °C, for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Add 600 µL of 100% Isopropanol...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of 100% Isopropanol and mix by inversion (30 times).

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Vortex briefly and spin down tubes
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly and spin down tubes. DO NOT VIGOROUSLY VORTEX.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of Viral Lysis Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of Viral Lysis Buffer .

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant using a fine-tip pasteur pipette
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant using a fine-tip pasteur pipette.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 24000 x g, 10 °C, for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 24000 x g, 10 °C, for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to a new microcentrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to a new microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 2700 x g, 4 °C, for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 2700 x g, 4 °C, for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5-1 mL plasma to a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: This section describes ethanol precipitation and...
steps.instruction: This section describes ethanol precipitation and purification of viral RNA from plasma.
